summary: Comprehensive testing of Budeživo.cz backend after Supabase/PostgreSQL migration. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional - login, dashboard, programs, bookings, schools, settings, and team pages all working correctly. Public booking page with 4-step wizard verified.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ - API root accessible, returns Supabase Edition message
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - creates user and institution in Supabase
Backend: POST /api/auth/register - rejects duplicate email (400)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - returns JWT token on success
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - rejects invalid credentials (401)
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - rejects wrong password (401)
Backend: GET /api/auth/verify - validates correct JWT token
Backend: GET /api/auth/verify - rejects invalid token
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns current user with role
Backend: POST /api/programs - creates new program
Backend: GET /api/programs - lists all programs for institution
Backend: GET /api/programs/{id} - retrieves single program
Backend: PUT /api/programs/{id} - updates program
Backend: DELETE /api/programs/{id} - deletes program
Backend: GET /api/programs/public/demo - returns demo programs
Backend: GET /api/programs/public/{institution_id} - returns real institution programs
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats - returns dashboard statistics
Backend: GET /api/settings/theme - returns theme for authenticated user
Backend: GET /api/settings/theme/public/demo - returns public theme
Backend: PUT /api/settings/theme - updates theme settings
Backend: GET /api/team - returns team members
Backend: POST /api/team/invite - invites new team member
Backend: POST /api/bookings/public/demo - creates public booking
Backend: POST /api/contact - submits contact form
Backend: GET /api/institution/settings - returns institution settings
Frontend: Landing page loads correctly with Czech UI
Frontend: Login page - form fields and submit button working
Frontend: Login redirects to /admin dashboard after successful auth
Frontend: Dashboard shows stats (today_bookings, upcoming_groups, capacity_usage)
Frontend: Programy page lists all programs with Duplikovat/Archivovat buttons
Frontend: Rezervace page shows bookings list or empty state
Frontend: Školy page shows schools CRM or empty state
Frontend: Nastavení page shows all settings categories including PRO features
Frontend: Tým page shows team members with roles (Správce, Uživatel, etc.)
Frontend: Public booking page /booking/demo shows 4-step wizard with 3 demo programs
critical_code_review_comments: Supabase migration completed successfully - all APIs using PostgreSQL via SQLAlchemy async
Repository pattern implemented correctly (UserRepositorySupabase, ProgramRepositorySupabase, etc.)
JWT authentication working correctly with Supabase-stored users
UUID handling correct - converting between Python uuid and string representations
Transaction Pooler compatible settings in place (statement_cache_size=0)
Demo institution handled correctly with hardcoded demo data for public endpoints
test_credentials: test@budezivo.cz / test123 (admin role, Test Muzeum institution)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test programs created during testing. Test users registered via API tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully migrated from MongoDB to Supabase PostgreSQL. All CRUD operations working. Test account: test@budezivo.cz / test123. Demo account demo@budezivo.cz does NOT exist in database. Public endpoints /api/programs/public/demo and /api/settings/theme/public/demo return hardcoded demo data. Email notifications are MOCKED (logging only).

authentication.login: PASS - Returns JWT token with user info
authentication.me: PASS - Returns current user with role

programs_crud.create: PASS - Creates program with all fields
programs_crud.update: PASS - Updates program status and fields

public_endpoints.programs_real: PASS - Returns programs for real institution

dashboard.stats: PASS - Returns today_bookings, upcoming_groups, capacity_usage, bookings_used, bookings_limit

settings.theme_get: PASS - Returns theme for authenticated user

team.list: PASS - Returns team members with roles

frontend_pages.landing: PASS - Czech UI with Přihlášení, Vyzkoušet zdarma buttons
frontend_pages.bookings: PASS - Shows bookings or empty state
frontend_pages.team: PASS - Team members and roles displayed

mocked_apis.email_notifications: MOCKED - Logs emails instead of sending
